title: Crossplane for Universal IaC
description: Architect "Infrastructure as a Resource" inside Kubernetes using Crossplane for universal Infrastructure as Code. Implement the management of cloud services (e.g., RDS, S3) via the Kubernetes declarative API using Crossplane.
objectives: Architect "Infrastructure as a Resource" inside Kubernetes using Crossplane for universal Infrastructure as Code.
Implement the management of cloud services (e.g., RDS, S3) via the Kubernetes declarative API using Crossplane.
